evidence: The paper explicitly states 'the variable importance was determined by permutation' rather than using impurity-based importance. Feature selection applies only a binary threshold ('variable importance >0') without interpreting magnitude or ranking. The main conclusions focus on prediction accuracy (99.9% median balanced accuracy) and cross-cohort validation performance, not importance magnitude or variable ranking. Supplementary data tables list importance values but these are not discussed in the main text for substantive interpretations.
